chapter_title.ar: باب لُزُومِ مَا يَنْفَعُ مِنَ الْمُعَامَلَاتِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 68 – Necessity of (continuing in) what is beneficial from the transactions

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/160)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/160)

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ali Bin Shajara, from Basheer Al Nabbal,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Whenever you are Graced in something, so necessitate (continue with) it’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from Ali ibn Shajarah from Bashir al-Nabbal who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When you (in a business) find sustenance in a certain item then you must continue with it.”
